revision.comment: +cat 「category:日本の行政」に都道府県のカテゴリが埋もれているので逃がす

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat|Prefectural governments in Japan|日本の都道府県議会および都道府県庁}} 日本の都道府県別の[[行政]]、[[地方自治]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{Catlink|日本の政治 (都道府県別)}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:にほんのきようせい}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)]]|version=60482559}} [[ja:Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)]]
==Old Content==
[[ja:Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)]] [[ko:Category:일본의 도도부현별 행정]] [[zh:Category:日本各都道府縣行政]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:京都府の行政]].
{{translated page|ja|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=did a replacement}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese administration]] [[Category:Politics of Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat|Prefectural governments in Japan|日本の都道府県議会および都道府県庁}} 日本の都道府県別の[[行政]]、[[地方自治]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{Catlink|日本の政治 (都道府県別)}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:にほんのきようせい}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Commonscat|Prefectural governments in Japan|日本の都道府県議会および都道府県庁}} {{Catlink|日本の政治 (都道府県別)}} {{citation needed|にほんのきようせい}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)|version=60482559}} {{translated page|ja|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=did a replacement}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese administration]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Politics of Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories]] [[ja:Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)]] [[ko:Category:일본의 도도부현별 행정]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:京都府の行政]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:日本各都道府縣行政]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work

Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commonscat|Prefectural governments in Japan|日本の都道府県議会および都道府県庁}} {{Catlink|日本の政治 (都道府県別)}} {{citation needed|にほんのきようせい}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)|version=60482559}} {{translated page|ja|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)|comment=did a replacement}} {{wikidata link|Q9675162}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:日本の行政 (都道府県別)]] [[ko:Category:일본의 도도부현별 행정]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:日本各都道府縣行政]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:京都府の行政]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japanese administration]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Politics of Japan by prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 6 Categories with no enwiki]]
